responses: Hello! Welcome to Birol Hotel. I'm Aria, your booking assistant. Would you like to book a room?
Hi there! I'm Aria from Birol Hotel. How can I help you today?
Greetings! Welcome to Birol Hotel. Shall we start a new booking?

patterns: I want to book a room
can I book a hotel room
I want to make a reservation
i want to stay at your hotel
responses: Of course! I'd be happy to help you book a room. May I start with your name, please?
Perfect! Let's get you booked in. Could you tell me your full name to begin?
Thank you, {name}! When would you like to stay with us? Please share your check-in and check-out dates.
Great — noted {checkin} to {checkout} ({nights} night(s)). How many guests will be staying?
Got it — {guests} guest(s). Would you like to include breakfast with your stay? (yes/no)
Excellent — breakfast will be included. How would you like to pay: credit card, debit card, or pay at the hotel?
Understood — no breakfast. How would you like to pay: credit card, debit card, or pay at the hotel?
Payment method noted: {payment}. Let me summarise your booking...
Your booking is confirmed! Reference: {booking_id}. A confirmation has been prepared. Is there anything else I can help with?
No problem — let's start again. May I have your name, please?
Thank you for choosing Birol Hotel. Have a wonderful day!
You're welcome! We look forward to hosting you. Safe travels!
You're most welcome! Anything else I can help with?
My pleasure! Let me know if you need anything else.
Here is our upcoming availability at Birol Hotel:
I can help you book a room at Birol Hotel. I'll ask for your name, dates, number of guests, breakfast preference, and payment method. Just say 'book a room' to begin.
I'm sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you rephrase? (You can say 'help' at any time.)
Hmm, I'm not sure I understood. Could you try that again?
